competitors.name: Foodpanda
competitors.description: Food delivery platform with restaurants and cloud kitchens
competitors.lessons_learned: Network effects crucial - need both restaurants and users. Customer acquisition expensive in competitive market.

competitors.name: Pathao
competitors.lessons_learned: Super-app strategy works - leverage existing base for new services. Unit economics critical for profitability.

competitors.name: bKash
competitors.description: Mobile financial services and digital wallet provider
competitors.lessons_learned: First-mover advantage in MFS market huge. Agent network is key differentiator. Regulatory approval non-negotiable.

competitors.name: Nagad
competitors.description: Digital payment and money transfer service
competitors.lessons_learned: Can disrupt entrenched players with better UX. Speed to market matters. Interoperability critical.

competitors.name: 10Minute
competitors.lessons_learned: Hyperlocal model works. Micro-fulfillment centers are capital intensive. Customer retention harder than acquisition.

competitors.name: Pickaboo
competitors.description: Electronics e-commerce platform, acquired by Daraz
competitors.lessons_learned: Hard to compete against global players. Acquisition more likely exit than IPO. Niche segments better.

competitors.name: Shurjo
competitors.description: Agricultural marketplace connecting farmers to buyers
competitors.lessons_learned: Agriculture sector huge but execution challenging. Farmer adoption requires trust building. Logistics complex.

competitors.name: Ting
competitors.description: Solar and renewable energy solutions for homes
competitors.lessons_learned: Deep tech requires capital. Financing options critical for adoption. Environmental impact is competitive moat.

competitors.name: Courierbox
competitors.lessons_learned: Logistics competitive market. Last-mile delivery is profit killer. B2B contracts more profitable than B2C.

competitors.name: Shebaot
competitors.lessons_learned: Healthcare regulation strict - need compliance expertise. Doctor supply chain bottleneck. Trust is currency.

competitors.name: Taskhive
competitors.description: HR and recruitment platform for SMEs
competitors.lessons_learned: SME segment has low spending power. B2B SaaS requires long sales cycles. Education/training needed.

competitors.name: EduTech Platform (defunct)
competitors.description: Online education platform, shut down during COVID
competitors.lessons_learned: EdTech market proven but crowded globally. India competition fierce. Local content/language important.

competitors.name: Zolve
competitors.lessons_learned: Diaspora segment has high spending power. Remittance market lucrative. Regulatory approval complex.

competitors.name: iSpace
competitors.lessons_learned: Real estate plays require capital. Occupancy rates critical KPI. B2B and B2C both important.

competitors.name: Aamar Pad
competitors.description: Rental platform for apartment and flat listings
competitors.lessons_learned: Real estate high trust barrier. Commission model tested. Multiple stakeholder management complex.
